title: EDIC Project Showcase 2026
description: The NUS Mars Rover Team showcased igNUS 2026 at the Engineering Design and Innovation Centre annual showcase, demonstrating our autonomous navigation capabilities and robotic arm to faculty, industry guests, and fellow students.

title: ExCELLence 2026 (ECE Project Showcase)
description: The NUS Mars Rover Team participated in the yearly ECE Project Showcase at the Engineering Auditorium, exhibiting our chassis, robotic arm, autonav and science capabilities to faculty, industry guests and fellow students.
